headline: Nvidia, Goldman Sachs, UnitedHealth and an Energy Stock on CNBC’s ‘Final Trades’
summary: NVIDIA, UnitedHealth, Goldman Sachs, Diamondback Energy all saw positive stock growth as announced on CNBC's Halftime Report.
